honesty: Pseudo-labels are TEACHER OPINIONS, not truth. Confidence = in-distribution cosine similarity to the gold set. Only high-confidence in-distribution videos may later be used as weak (0.1–0.3 weight) training signal, and ONLY if a student trained with them improves real held-out retention. This file is the cautious amplifier, never a source of ground truth.
